author: anon-ab6221f8
content: All hook files use bare except-pass that swallows everything including KeyboardInterrupt, MemoryError, NameError, etc. Each should be narrowed to the expected failure mode: OSError for file reads, json.JSONDecodeError for parsing, KeyError/TypeError for config lookups. Affects prompt-guard.py (~12 sites), work-check.py, pre-web-check.py, heartbeat.py, session-start.py.
